SELECT
    (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM min_customers WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM min_customers WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM min_customers WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM min_customers WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM min_customers WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM min_customers WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM (
    WITH total_cons AS (
        SELECT ym.CustomerID,
               SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
        FROM yearmonth ym
        JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
          AND ym.Date LIKE '2013%'
        GROUP BY ym.CustomerID
    ),
    min_cons AS (
        SELECT MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total FROM total_cons
    ),
    min_customers AS (
        SELECT tc.CustomerID,
               tc.total_consumption,
               c.Segment
        FROM total_cons tc
        JOIN customers c ON tc.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        JOIN min_cons mc ON tc.total_consumption = mc.min_total
    )
    SELECT * FROM min_customers
) AS min_customers;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM (
    SELECT
        c.Segment,
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2013
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
      AND substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment
) AS p
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT
        MAX(
            CASE
                WHEN cons_2012 = 0 THEN NULL
                ELSE (cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2012
            END
        ) AS max_pct,
        MIN(
            CASE
                WHEN cons_2012 = 0 THEN NULL
                ELSE (cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2012
            END
        ) AS min_pct
    FROM (
        SELECT
            Segment,
            cons_2012,
            cons_2013,
            CASE
                WHEN cons_2012 = 0 THEN NULL
                ELSE (cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2012
            END AS pct_increase
        FROM (
            SELECT
                c.Segment,
                SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2012,
                SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2013
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
              AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
              AND substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
            GROUP BY c.Segment
        )
    )
) AS agg
WHERE 
    (CASE WHEN cons_2012 = 0 THEN NULL ELSE (cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2012 END) = agg.max_pct
    OR (CASE WHEN cons_2012 = 0 THEN NULL ELSE (cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2012 END) = agg.min_pct;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
